user.title: Tankstellen Austria
user.description: Set up fuel price monitoring for your area.

data_description.dynamic_entity: Optional: select a device_tracker entity to update prices based on your current GPS position. Leave empty for fixed location mode.
data_description.scan_interval: Only used in fixed location mode. In dynamic mode a 6-hour safety-net timer applies regardless of this value.

error.invalid_location: Please select a valid location on the map.
error.no_fuel_type: Please select at least one fuel type.

abort.already_configured: A Tankstellen Austria entry for this location already exists.
